ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peaks" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak */,
  "peak_name" TEXT /* Name of the peak */,
  "elevation_m" INTEGER /* Elevation of the peak in meters */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the peak */,
  "prominence_m" INTEGER /* Prominence of the peak in meters */,
  "gain_m" INTEGER /* Gain in elevation when climbing the peak in meters */,
  "peak_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the peak */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the peak information was last updated */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin responsible for managing the peak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peaks_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES climbers ("climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climbers" (
  "climber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climber */,
  "climber_name" TEXT /* Full name of the climber */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the climber */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the climber (e.g., climber, team leader, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the climber */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the climber */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the climber (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ascents" (
  "ascent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ascent */,
  "climber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climber who made the ascent */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak ascended */,
  "ascent_date" TEXT /* Date of the ascent */,
  "elevation_gain_m" INTEGER /* Elevation gain in meters during the ascent */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ascent */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ascent */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the ascent */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken during the ascent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ascent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ascents_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ascents_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ascents_climber_id FOREIGN KEY ("climber_id") REFERENCES climbers ("climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "date_formed" TEXT /* Date when the team was formed */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES climbers ("climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "climber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climber */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the climber joined the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the climber in the team (e.g., member, assistant leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_ascents" (
  "team_ascent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team ascent */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the ascent */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak ascended */,
  "ascent_date" TEXT /* Date of the ascent */,
  "elevation_gain_m" INTEGER /* Elevation gain in meters during the ascent */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the team ascent */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the team ascent */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the team ascent */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken during the team ascent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_ascent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ascents_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ascents_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ascents_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty of the route */,
  "route_length_m" INTEGER /* Length of the route in meters */,
  "route_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the route information was last updated */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin responsible for managing the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES climbers ("climber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climber_routes" (
  "climber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climber */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "ascent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ascent where the climber took the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climber_id", "route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climber_routes_ascent_id FOREIGN KEY ("ascent_id") REFERENCES ascents ("ascent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_routes" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "team_ascent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team ascent where the team took the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_routes_team_ascent_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_ascent_id") REFERENCES team_ascents ("team_ascent_id")
)
